stemHtml: Which of the following statements is correct regarding the cooling/warming of the Earth's surface by radiation?

options.a: The Earth is heated by short-wave radiation from the Sun, but cooled by its own long-wave radiation into space.
options.b: The Earth is heated by long-wave radiation from the Sun, but cooled by its own short-wave radiation into space.
options.c: Short wave radiation heats the Earth during the day. At night, the Earth is cooled by convection.
options.d: Cloud cover has NO effect on the amount of the Sun's radiated heat arriving at the Earth's surface.
